Package index

All functions

AddScreeningFailures()
Add Screening Failures to Enrolled Subjects
Analyze_StudyKRI_PredictBounds()
Calculate Bootstrap-Based Confidence Bounds for Study-Level KRI
Analyze_StudyKRI_PredictBoundsRef()
Predict Bounds for Multiple Studies Using Reference Study Mappings
Analyze_StudyKRI_PredictBoundsRefSet()
Predict Bounds for Combined Group of Studies
BindLists()
BindLists
BindResults()
Helper function to bind results from multiple workflows
Input_CountSiteByMonth()
Calculate Monthly Count by Site and Month
JoinKRIByDenominator()
Join KRI Analysis_Input by Denominator Type
MakeCharts_StudyKRI()
Create Study KRI Comparison Charts
ParseFunction()
Parse Function String to Function Object
Report_StudyKRI()
Generate StudyKRI reports per study (Report_KRI-compatible)
ResampleStudy()
Resample Study Data
SimulatePortfolio()
Simulate a Portfolio of Studies
Transform_CumCount()
Transform Cumulative Counts to Study Level
Transform_Long()
Transform Wide Format Results to Long Format
Visualize_StudyKRI()
Visualize Study KRI with Confidence Intervals
